title: EmbeddedMC
description: In this Fabric Mod you can run in Singleplayer a Minecraft Paper/Purpur/Folia Server to test your Plugins. No need to extra create a server all is directly in your Minecraft instance. You have full control, you can directly edit config files ingame,...
body:
---
  ![EmbeddedMC Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7b75d5bc32de68232e7a2fe47724b99ad3533f2.png)

  # Singleplayer with Plugins!

  **EmbeddedMC** lets you run Paper, Purpur, Folia, or Spigot servers directly within Minecraft singleplayer. Play with Bukkit/Spigot/Paper plugins in your singleplayer worlds!

  ---

  ## Features

  - **Embedded Server Support** - Run Paper, Purpur, Folia, or Spigot servers alongside your Minecraft client
  - **Automatic Downloads** - Server JARs are automatically downloaded from official APIs
  - **Multiple Instances** - Create and manage multiple server instances with different configurations
  - **In-Game Console** - Access the server console directly from within Minecraft
  - **Plugin Manager** - Browse and manage installed plugins with built-in config editor
  - **File Browser** - Navigate and edit server files without leaving the game
  - **One-Click Connect** - Start servers and connect automatically
  - **Configurable Settings** - Customize RAM, port, and JVM arguments per instance
  - **Multi-Language** - English and German translations included
  - **Ingame Edits** - You have the File Explorer and file editor directly in the Game
  - **Ingame Server Console** - The Server Console is accesibly INGAME!

  ---

  ## How It Works

  ### Creating a Server
  1. Click **"Singleplayer with Plugins"** on the title screen
  2. Click **"Create"** to create a new server instance
  3. Enter a name, select server type, and choose Minecraft version
  4. The server JAR will be downloaded automatically!

  ### Playing
  1. Select your server instance from the list
  2. Click **"Start"** to start the server
  3. You'll be connected automatically once the server is ready
  4. Access the server console anytime from the pause menu

  ### Managing Plugins
  1. Select a server instance and click **"Plugins"**
  2. Add plugin JARs to the plugins folder
  3. Edit plugin configurations directly in-game!

  ---

  ## Supported Servers

  | Server | Auto-Download | Notes |
  |--------|:-------------:|-------|
  | Paper | Yes | Full API support |
  | Purpur | Yes | Full API support |
  | Folia | Yes | Full API support |
  | Spigot | No | Manual JAR placement required |

  ---

  ## Requirements

  - Minecraft 1.21.11
  - Fabric Loader 0.18.0+
  - Fabric API
  - Java 21+

  ---

  ## Links

  - [Source Code on GitHub](https://github.com/LowdFX/EmbeddedMC)

  ---

  *This mod is not affiliated with Mojang, Microsoft, PaperMC, or PurpurMC.*

  ---
